candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Assume for the common-emitter circuit shown in the figure, we have the following numerical values for a germanium transistor. $V_{BB}$ = + 15V $V_{CC}$ = + 15V $V_{BE}$ = 0.3V $R_C$ = 4k$\Omega$ $R_E$ = 600$\Omega$ $\beta$ = 60. What value of $R_B$ is required to set $V_{CE}$ to 8 V?
